    Talks and presentations

    Selected invited talks, conference presentations, and posters.

    2026

    Jun 10
    Talk Elche, Spain

    X-ray-luminous late-type giants: an overlooked population contribute to Galactic ridge iron line emission

    XMM-Newton conference
    Symbiotic stars are one of the main contributor to the GRXE 6.7 keV emission
    Jun 04
    Talk Barcelona, Spain

    A comprehensive census of X-ray periodic sources in dense clusters with NewAthena high-resolution timing

    ICE-CSIC Barcelona
    Searching for periodic X-ray sources: from Chandra to NewAthena

    2025

    Dec 03
    Talk Milan, Italy

    Periodic X-ray sources: diagnosing the nature and evolution for exotic binaries in dense environment

    INAF IASF-MI
    Study of periodic X-ray sources in dense stellar environments.
    Sep 10
    Talk Como, Italy

    Unveiling the Soft X-ray Source Population of the Inner Galactic Disk with XMM-Newton

    Colma di Sormano
    Soft X-ray in the inner Galactic Disk using XMM heritage survey
    Mar 30
    Talk Dali, China

    Exploring the origin and evolution of close binaries in Globular clusters and the Galactic Center

    Structure, Formation, and Evolution of Star Clusters
    Formation and evolution mechanisms of CVs in globular clusters and galactic centers

    2023

    Apr 23
    Talk Zhuhai, China

    Diagnosing dynamical formation and evolution of cataclysmic variables in globular clusters

    Structure, Formation, and Evolution of Star Clusters
    Discussing formation and evolution mechanisms of CVs in globular clusters.
    Apr 01
    Talk New York, USA

    Periodic X-ray sources: diagnosing the nature and evolution for exotic binaries in dense environment

    Department of Physics, Columbia University
    This talk covers periodic X-ray sources and their dynamical evolution in dense stellar environments.
    Mar 23
    Poster Hawaii, USA

    Periodic X-ray sources in globular clusters: diagnosing dynamical formation and evolution of cataclysmic variables

    Hawaii
    This Poster covers periodic X-ray sources and their dynamical evolution in dense stellar environments.
    Mar 17
    Talk Xiamen, China

    Searching for Quasi-periodic Oscillations in Active Galactic Nuclei of the Chandra Deep Field South

    Research on the Variations of Active Galactic Nuclei
    Focusing on QPOs in AGN using Chandra Deep Field South data.
    Jan 01
    Talk Suzhou, China

    Exploring the Outskirts of Globular Clusters with eROSITA

    eROSITA Scientific Exploitation Workshop
    This talk presents results from the eROSITA survey of globular cluster outskirts.

    2022

    Jun 17
    Talk Beijing, China

    Searching for Quasi-periodic Oscillations in Active Galactic Nuclei of the Chandra Deep Field South

    The 60th Anniversary of X-Ray Astronomy
    Further discussion on QPOs in AGN for the Chandra Deep Field South.
    May 10
    Talk Nanjing, China

    Periodic X-ray Sources in the Galactic Center/Bulge -- Application of the Gregory-Loredo Algorithm

    2021-2022 Academic Annual Meeting of Jiangsu Astronomical Society
    Analysis of periodic X-ray sources in Galactic Center/Bulge using the Gregory-Loredo algorithm.

    2021

    Apr 21
    Talk Online

    Searching for Quasi-periodic Oscillations of Active Galactic Nuclei in the Chandra Deep Field South

    Chandra Data Science: Novel Methods in Computing and Statistics for X-ray Astronomy
    Presentation on QPOs of AGN using advanced computational techniques.
    Jan 12
    Talk Kunming, China

    Diagnosing dynamical origin of exotic binaries in the massive globular cluster 47 Tucanae

    The 4th X-ray binary Multi-Band research Symposium
    Dynamical origin of exotic binaries in 47 Tucanae.

    Talk Online

    Talk Jinan, China
